title: Reddit Get Post Node Credential Error
symptom: When using an expression in the Reddit Get Post node, n8n throws an error stating 'node doesn’t have credentials set'.
root_cause: The error occurs because the node fails to recognize the credentials when expressions are used. This can happen if the credentials are not properly linked or if there is a mismatch in how they are set when using dynamic values.
fix_steps: Open the Reddit Get Post node settings
Set the credentials again from the dropdown
agent_instruction: Unset and then re-set the credentials for the Reddit Get Post node.
